May be hard to spot along the fence line since the trees are dense, so look for fruit fallen on the ground to spot this tree quickly. It is halfway between the bathrooms and the sandy playground. Access: Private but overhanging.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
6161 Dave Ward Dr, Conway, AR 72034, USA

BEWARE! I found this before the berries ripened, and I am not sure if this sumac is the edible kind or the poisonous kind. Be certain in your identification if you plan to forage for sumac, it can be toxic Access: Private.
